data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. HandoffCapsules component in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx satisfies all requirements: (1) displayed in right sidebar, (2) reverse chronological order via [...capsules].reverse(), (3) section-level + individual item collapsibility via ChevronDown/ChevronRight, (4) scroll overflow via max-h-[50vh] overflow-y-auto, (5) defensive type checks throughout. Typecheck clean, no lint issues in changed file, no security concerns.
